preserved_genesis_vector_table.why: Preserve SGDK/launcher exception vectors during offset-carry maincpu copy.

address_rewrites.note: NOP entire display list write function 0x560DA-0x56111. Stops per-frame C-Window SRAM pointer writes and advancement.
Restore original word-fill primitive used by title/front-end prep call chains (0x3AF5E, 0x3AF6E, and 0x3B076).
Restore longword fill primitive for active title-prep callers landing at relocated 0x03AF56.
Direct title sprite-prep ownership: clear WRAM descriptor blocks (A5+0x11B2 and A5+0x0170) via in-path longword fill primitive.
Direct title text/tile prep ownership: fill text-shadow staging page with 0x00000020 cells (space glyph) using in-path longword fill primitive.
NOP movew #0,%a1@+ in boot text fill loop. Ghidra Build 125 report listed this as 0x000714 in relocated ROM view.
NOP movew #32,%a1@+ in boot text fill loop. Ghidra Build 125 report listed this as 0x000718 in relocated ROM view.
RTS out of startup hardware probe routine that scans C-window/D-window ranges. Prevents early accesses to unmapped arcade window space on Genesis.

NOP tilemap write function A (0x55968-0x5598D). Writes tile data through A5@(4256) C-Window pointer each frame. Will become VDP nametable writes. [Build 109: replaced NOP with JSR to genesistan_hook_tilemap_plane_a + RTS]
NOP tilemap write function B (0x55990-0x559AF). Writes tile data through A5@(4260) C-Window pointer each frame. Replaced with JSR genesistan_hook_tilemap_plane_b + RTS.
NOP C-Window addr store (0x556F2-0x556FB). addil #0xC08000,d1 + movel d1,a5@(4260). Stops display-list pointer advancing into C-Window range each frame.
NOP workram modifier 0x558C6-0x558DD. addql #4 loop over sprite descriptor table at 0x10D000. Harmless on Genesis but reads uninit workram causing garbage.
NOP companion reset 0x558E0-0x55901. Reads/writes sprite descriptor workram slots. Uninit workram propagation path.
NOP sprite descriptor reader 0x55904-0x55945. Loads LONG from workram 0x10D000 as pointer into A4, dereferences it. Zero-init workram gives A4=0 -> reads reset vectors.

NOP second C-Window addr store to A5@(4260). addil #0xC08000,d0 + movel d0,a5@(4260) at 0x5577E. Parallel path to 0x556F2 (Build 103). Still advancing C-Window page 2 pointer causing crash at 0x209D66.
NOP MOVE.W #0x0032, 0xC08A52. Direct C-Window write. Length=8 only (trailing 2 bytes at 0x03A358 are start of separate instruction).
NOP cmpib #48,0xC09EA3 + BNE. READ from VDP-range 0xC09EA3 crashes BlastEm. Called from BSR at 0x3A54A. moveb at 0x3A55C already NOPed in prior build.
NOP MOVE.B #0x20, 0xC09EA3. Direct C-Window write.
RTS+NOP transition-cluster swap helper path A. Bypasses 0x0100/0x0080/0x00C0 32-word buffer rotation used across attract/coin/start transitions.
RTS+NOP transition-cluster swap helper path B. Pair with 0x03A294; keeps 0x03A274 control gating while removing raw pointer-bearing buffer shuffles.
NOP JSR 0x55DDC from title/front-end flow. Avoids unstable helper path that reaches ADDRESS ERROR around 0x055D0A on Genesis.
NOP second JSR 0x55DDC callsite in title/front-end flow. Same crash-avoidance as 0x03A6B2.
Bypass C-Window read probe cmpi.b #0x43,0xC09E87 + BNE by forcing BRA to 0x03AC68. Prevents crash on live C-Window page 2 access.
NOP MOVE.W #0x2744, 0xC08E7A + BRA.S +8. Direct C-Window write and conditional branch that follows it.
NOP MOVE.W #0x2744, 0xC08E66. Direct C-Window write. Length=8 only (trailing 0x6100 is first word of BSR.W, incomplete).
NOP MOVE.W D0, 0xC08C62. Direct C-Window write.
NOP MOVE.W #0x2749, 0xC09172. Direct C-Window write. Length=8 only (trailing 0x3B7C is start of next instruction, incomplete).
NOP MOVE.W D1, 0xC08C66. Direct C-Window write. original_bytes uses ROM form (patcher remapped 0x00C08C66 -> 0x00208C66).
NOP MOVE.L #0xC00400, 0x10A0(A5). Stores C-Window base into A5 workram slot (ptr init a5@(4256)).
NOP ADDIL #0xC08000,D0 + MOVE.L D0,0x10A0(A5). Stores advanced C-Window base into A5@(4256) (second path).
NOP ADDIL #0xC00000, D0. Adds C-Window base to D0 — part of pointer advancement sequence.
NOP MOVEA.L #0xC00828, A1. Loads C-Window address into A1.
NOP MOVEA.L #0xC00028, A1. Loads C-Window address into A1 (second path).
NOP MOVE.L #0xC08000, abs.l(0x10D0A0). Stores C-Window page 2 base into arcade workram.
NOP MOVE.L #0xC00000, abs.l(0x10D0F8). Stores C-Window page 0 base into arcade workram.
NOP MOVE.L #0xC08000, abs.l(0x10D0A4). Stores C-Window page 2 base into arcade workram (second slot).
NOP MOVE.L #0xC00000, abs.l(0x10D0F8). Duplicate store C-Window page 0 base into workram.
NOP MOVE.L #0xC08000, abs.l(0x10D0A0). Duplicate store C-Window page 2 base into workram.
NOP MOVE.L #0xC0BF00,D0 + MOVE.L D0,abs.l(0x10D0A4). Length=12 only (trailing 0x33FC at 0x05042C is start of next MOVE.W, incomplete).
NOP MOVEA.L #0xC08000,A0 + MOVEA.L #0xC00000,A1 + MOVE.L (A0),D0. Fill-loop initialisation loading both C-Window page addresses.
Retarget title/logo sprite producer clear base from legacy D-window staging (0xD00048 alias path) to renderer-consumed descriptor block A (A5+0x11B2 => 0xFF11FE).
Retarget title/logo sprite producer descriptor write base from legacy table 0x10C170 to renderer-consumed block B base (A5+0x0170 => 0xFF01BC).
Retarget block-B descriptor builder base 0x10C170 to renderer-consumed block-B base (A5+0x0170 => 0xFF01BC).
Retarget block-B descriptor fallback base 0x10C170 to renderer-consumed block-B base (A5+0x0170 => 0xFF01BC).
Retarget block-B descriptor slot base 0x10C178 to renderer-consumed slot (A5+0x0178 => 0xFF01C4).
Retarget block-B descriptor fallback slot base 0x10C178 to renderer-consumed slot (A5+0x0178 => 0xFF01C4).
Retarget block-B descriptor slot base 0x10C180 to renderer-consumed slot (A5+0x0180 => 0xFF01CC).
Retarget block-B descriptor fallback slot base 0x10C180 to renderer-consumed slot (A5+0x0180 => 0xFF01CC).
Retarget block-B descriptor slot base 0x10C188 to renderer-consumed slot (A5+0x0188 => 0xFF01D4).
Retarget block-B descriptor fallback slot base 0x10C188 to renderer-consumed slot (A5+0x0188 => 0xFF01D4).
Retarget block-A descriptor builder base 0xD00048 to renderer-consumed block-A base (A5+0x11B2 => 0xFF11FE).
Adapt block-A descriptor attr write to active renderer-visible nonzero attr.
Adapt block-A descriptor attr write to active renderer-visible nonzero attr.
Adapt block-A descriptor attr write to active renderer-visible nonzero attr.
Adapt block-A descriptor attr write to active renderer-visible nonzero attr.
Adapt block-A descriptor attr write to active renderer-visible nonzero attr.
Retarget secondary block-A descriptor fixup base 0xD00048 to renderer-consumed block-A base (A5+0x11B2 => 0xFF11FE).
Replace legacy scroll clear with direct Genesis VDP scroll sync from live workram.
Replace legacy scroll clear with direct Genesis VDP scroll sync from live workram.
Replace startup scroll clear write with direct Genesis VDP scroll sync from live workram.
Replace startup scroll clear write with direct Genesis VDP scroll sync from live workram.
Route title text dispatch to genesistan_hook_text_writer_3bb48 bridge (arcade descriptor -> Genesis plane tile write translation).
NOP move.w d2,(a1)+ inside text writer 0x3BB48 — silences all C-window writes via this function (normal write path)
NOP move.w d0,(a1)+ inside text writer 0x3BB48 (normal write path)
NOP move.w d2,(a1)+ inside text writer 0x3BB48 (space-fill path)
NOP move.w d1,(a1)+ inside text writer 0x3BB48 (space-fill path)
RTS+NOP movea.l #0xC08000,A0 base load path. Prevent computed C-window access.
RTS+NOP movea.l #0xC08000,A0 base load path. Prevent computed C-window access.
RTS+NOP movea.l #0xC08000,A0 base load path. Prevent computed C-window access.
NOP move.w #0,0xC50000. Direct C-window/control write, unmapped on Genesis.
NOP move.w #1,0xC50000. Direct C-window/control write, unmapped on Genesis.
NOP move.w #0,0xC50000 in init path. Direct C-window/control write, unmapped on Genesis.
Keep movew d2,(a2)+ active in secondary text writer so translated descriptor destinations receive attribute words.
Keep movew d3,(a2)+ active in secondary text writer so translated descriptor destinations receive glyph words.
NOP move.w d1,(a0)+ where A0 is C-window text address base (0xC0975C).
NOP move.w d0,(a0) in c-window text/status writer (A0 based at 0xC09376 + offset).
NOP move.w #1,(a0)+ in c-window writer helper (A0=0xC0887C).
NOP move.w #0x2744,(a0) in c-window writer helper (A0=0xC0887C).
NOP move.w #0x274B,(a0) in c-window writer helper (A0=0xC08D6E + offset).
NOP move.w #0,(a0)+ in c-window writer helper (A0=0xC08D6C + offset).
NOP move.w d0,(a0) in c-window writer helper (A0=0xC08D6E + offset).
Greyscale ramp, 2048 entries, 16-level per bank.  Build 113 placeholder.
Genesis workram base at ROM 0x10C000 so arcade A5 reload finds correct base.

goal: Execute the original startup/title/front-end remap from original ROM bytes using a spec-driven translation pass.
